   10138           0 :     intn            status = 0; /* routine return status variable */
   10139             : 
   10140             :     int32           fid;  /* HDF-EOS file ID */
   10141             :     int32           sdInterfaceID;  /* HDF SDS interface ID */
   10142             :     int32           sdid; /* SDS ID */
   10143             : 
   10144             :     int32           dum;  /* Dummy variable */
   10145             :     int32           rankSDS;  /* Rank of SDS/Field */
   10146             : 
   10147             :     int32           dims[8];  /* Field/SDS dimensions */
   10148             :     int32           tileFlags;  /* flag to determine if field is tiled */
   10149             :     int32           numTileDims;/* number of tiles spanning a dimension */
   10150             :     HDF_CHUNK_DEF   tileDef;  /* union holding tiling info. */
   10151             : 
   10152             : 
   10153             :     /* Get gridID */
   10154           0 :     status = GDchkgdid(gridID, "GDwrrdtile", &fid, &sdInterfaceID, &dum);
   10155           0 :     if (status == 0)
   10156             :     {
   10157             : 
   10158             :   /* Get field info */
   10159           0 :   status = GDfieldinfo(gridID, fieldname, &rankSDS, dims, &dum, NULL);
   10160             : 
   10161           0 :   if (status == 0)
   10162             :   {
   10163             : 
   10164             :       /* Check whether fieldname is in SDS (multi-dim field) */
   10165             :       /* --------------------------------------------------- */
   10166           0 :       status = GDSDfldsrch(gridID, sdInterfaceID, fieldname, &sdid,
   10167             :          &rankSDS, &dum, &dum, dims, &dum);
   10168             : 
   10169             : 
   10170             : 
   10171             :       /*
   10172             :        * Check for errors in parameters passed to GDwritetile or
   10173             :        * GDreadtile
   10174             :        */
   10175             : 
   10176             :       /* Check if untiled field */
   10177           0 :       status = SDgetchunkinfo(sdid, &tileDef, &tileFlags);
   10178           0 :       if (tileFlags == HDF_NONE)
   10179             :       {
   10180           0 :     HEpush(DFE_GENAPP, "GDwrrdtile", __FILE__, __LINE__);
   10181           0 :     HEreport("Field \"%s\" is not tiled.\n", fieldname);
   10182           0 :     status = -1;
   10183           0 :     return (status);
   10184             : 
   10185             :       }
   10186             : 
   10187             :       /*
   10188             :        * Check if rd/wr tilecoords are within the extent of the field
   10189             :        */
   10190           0 :       for (i = 0; i < rankSDS; i++)
   10191             :       {
   10192             :     /*
   10193             :      * Calculate the number of tiles which span a dimension of
   10194             :      * the field
   10195             :      */
   10196           0 :     numTileDims = dims[i] / tileDef.chunk_lengths[i];
   10197           0 :     if ((start[i] >= numTileDims) || (start[i] < 0))
   10198             :     {
   10199             :         /*
   10200             :          * ERROR INDICATING BEYOND EXTENT OF THAT DIMENSION OR

   10202             :          */

   10204           0 :         HEreport("Tilecoords for dimension \"%d\" ...\n", i);
   10205           0 :         HEreport("is beyond the extent of dimension length\n");
   10206           0 :         status = -1;
   10207             : 
   10208             :     }
   10209             :       }
   10210             : 
   10211           0 :       if (status == -1)
   10212             :       {
   10213           0 :     return (status);
   10214             :       }
   10215             : 
   10216             : 
   10217             :       /* Actually write/read to the field */
   10218             : 
   10219           0 :       if (strcmp(code, "w") == 0) /* write tile */
   10220             :       {
   10221           0 :     status = SDwritechunk(sdid, start, (VOIDP) datbuf);
   10222             :       }
   10223           0 :       else if (strcmp(code, "r") == 0)  /* read tile */

   10225           0 :     status = SDreadchunk(sdid, start, (VOIDP) datbuf);
   10226             :       }
   10227             : 
   10228             : 
   10229             :   }
   10230             : 
   10231             :   /* Non-existent fieldname */

   10233             :   {
   10234           0 :       HEpush(DFE_GENAPP, "GDwrrdtile", __FILE__, __LINE__);
   10235           0 :       HEreport("Fieldname \"%s\" does not exist.\n", fieldname);
   10236           0 :       status = -1;
   10237             :   }
   10238             : 
   10239             :     }
   10240             : 
   10241           0 :     return (status);
   10242             : }

   10246             : GDtileinfo --
   10247             :      This function queries the field to determine if it is tiled.  If it is

   10269             :

   10273             :

   10279             :

   10290             :

   10301             :       }
   10302             :

   10338             : GDwritetile --
   10339             :      This function writes one tile to a particular field.
   10340             : 
   10341             : 
   10342             : Author--
   10343             : Alexis Zubrow
   10344             : 
   10345             : ********************************************************/
   10346             : 
   10347             : intn

   10355             : 
   10356           0 :     return (status);
   10357             : }

   10362             : 
   10363             : Author--

   10378             : }

   10398             :

   10452             : /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
   10453             : |  BEGIN_PROLOG                                                               |
   10454             : |                                                                             |
   10455             : |  FUNCTION: GDsettilecomp                                                    |
   10456             : |                                                                             |
   10457             : |  DESCRIPTION: Sets the tiling/compression parameters for the   specified    |
   10458             : |               field. This can be called after GDsetfillvalue and assumes    |
   10459             : |               that the field was defined with no compression/tiling  set    |
   10460             : |               by GDdeftile or GDdefcomp.                                    |
   10461             : |                                                                             |
   10462             : |               This function replaces the following sequence:                |
   10463             : |                  GDdefcomp                                                  |
   10464             : |                  GDdeftile                                                  |
   10465             : |                  GDdeffield                                                 |
   10466             : |                  GDsetfillvalue                                             |
   10467             : |               with:                                                         |
   10468             : |                  GDdeffield                                                 |
   10469             : |                  GDsetfillvalue                                             |
   10470             : |                  GDsettilecomp                                              |
   10471             : |               so that fill values will work correctly.                      |
   10472             : |                                                                             |
   10473             : |  Return Value    Type     Units     Description                             |
   10474             : |  ============   ======  =========   =====================================   |
   10475             : |  status         intn                return status (0) SUCCEED, (-1) FAIL    |
   10476             : |                                                                             |
   10477             : |  INPUTS:                                                                    |
   10478             : |  gridID         int32               grid structure ID                       |
   10479             : |  fieldname      char                field name                              |
   10480             : |  tilerank       int32               number of tiling dimensions             |
   10481             : |  tiledims       int32               tiling dimensions                       |
   10482             : |  compcode       int32               compression code                        |
   10483             : |  compparm       intn                compression parameters                  |
   10484             : |                                                                             |
   10485             : |  OUTPUTS:                                                                   |
   10486             : |             None                                                            |
   10487             : |                                                                             |
   10488             : |  NOTES:                                                                     |
   10489             : |                                                                             |
   10490             : |                                                                             |
   10491             : |   Date     Programmer   Description                                         |
   10492             : |  ======   ============  =================================================   |
   10493             : |  Jun 98   MISR          Used GDsetfillvalue as a template and copied        |
   10494             : |                         tiling/comp portions of GDdeffield.(NCR15866).      |
   10495             : |                                                                             |
   10496             : |  END_PROLOG                                                                 |
   10497             : -----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
   10498             : intn
   10499           0 : GDsettilecomp(int32 gridID, const char *fieldname, int32 tilerank, int32*
   10500             :                tiledims, int32 compcode, intn* compparm)
   10501             : {
   10502             :     intn            status;     /* routine return status variable */

   10504             :     int32           fid;        /* HDF-EOS file ID */
   10505             :     int32           sdInterfaceID;      /* HDF SDS interface ID */
   10506             :     int32           gdVgrpID;   /* Grid root Vgroup ID */
   10507             :     int             i;          /* Looping variable. */
   10508             :     int32           sdid;       /* SDS id */
   10509             :     int32           nt;         /* Number type */
   10510             :     int32           dims[8];    /* Dimensions array */
   10511             :     int32           dum;        /* Dummy variable */
   10512             :     int32           solo;       /* "Solo" (non-merged) field flag */
   10513             :     comp_info       c_info;     /* Compression parameter structure */
   10514             :     HDF_CHUNK_DEF   chunkDef;   /* Tiling structure */
   10515             :     int32           chunkFlag;  /* Chunking (Tiling) flag */
   10516             :  
   10517           0 :     c_info.nbit.nt = 0;
   10518             :  
   10519             :     /* Check for valid grid ID and get SDS interface ID */
   10520           0 :     status = GDchkgdid(gridID, "GDsetfillvalue",
   10521             :                        &fid, &sdInterfaceID, &gdVgrpID);
   10522             :  
   10523           0 :     if (status == 0)
   10524             :     {
   10525             :         /* Get field info */
   10526           0 :         status = GDfieldinfo(gridID, fieldname, &dum, dims, &nt, NULL);
   10527             :  
   10528           0 :         if (status == 0)
   10529             :         {
   10530             :             /* Get SDS ID and solo flag */
   10531           0 :             status = GDSDfldsrch(gridID, sdInterfaceID, fieldname,
   10532             :                                  &sdid, &dum, &dum, &dum,
   10533             :                                  dims, &solo);
   10534           0 :             if (status !=0) {
   10535           0 :               HEpush(DFE_GENAPP, "GDsettilecomp", __FILE__, __LINE__);
   10536           0 :               HEreport("GDSDfldsrch failed\n", fieldname);
   10537           0 :               return FAIL;
   10538             :             }
   10539             :             /* Tiling with Compression */
   10540             :             /* ----------------------- */
   10541             :  
   10542             :  
   10543             :             /* Setup Compression */
   10544             :             /* ----------------- */
   10545           0 :             if (compcode == HDFE_COMP_NBIT)
   10546             :               {
   10547           0 :                 c_info.nbit.nt = nt;
   10548           0 :                 c_info.nbit.sign_ext = compparm[0];
   10549           0 :                 c_info.nbit.fill_one = compparm[1];
   10550           0 :                 c_info.nbit.start_bit = compparm[2];
   10551           0 :                 c_info.nbit.bit_len = compparm[3];
   10552             :               }

   10560             :               }
   10561             :

   10566           0 :                 chunkDef.comp.chunk_lengths[i] = tiledims[i];
   10567             :               }

   10573             :

   10585             :               }

   10625             : |  lowrightpt     float64             lower right corner coordinates (DMS)    |

   10627             : |  latitude       float64             latitude array (DMS)                    |

   10631             : |  x              float64             X value array                           |
   10632             : |  y              float64             Y value array                           |
   10633             : |  scaleX   float64             X grid size                             |
   10634             : |  scaley         float64             Y grid size                             |

   10666           0 :   status = -1;
